productDisplayName: Urban Yoga Men Black Track Pants
description: CompositionBlack track pants made of 100% cotton, handy side pockets, comfortable elastic waistband with inner drawstring, brand name and logo embroidered on the left leg and red panel from the pocket to the hem on the sidesFitRegularWash careHand or machine wash cold with a mild detergentWash dark colours separatelyTumble dry lowDry in shadeDo not bleachWarm ironIf you want to look stylish as you work out in the gym, or go for a walk or jog in the park, these track pants from urban yoga belong in your wardrobe. The fabric is breathable, and the waist band is soft; for a more snug fit you can use the internal drawstring too. Team it up with a cool T-shirt and an excellent pair of shoes to hit the road.Model statisticsThe product is a size 32 on a model of height 6' and waist 32"
